svg.title: Phase 12 — Stripe Checkout flow
svg.desc: Diagram showing the complete checkout flow from cart to order confirmation, including browser, server, database, and Stripe interactions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Checkout button in cart.tsx')
sendPrompt('Explain the orders and order_items tables')
sendPrompt('Explain how line_items are built for Stripe')
sendPrompt('What does Stripe do with the checkout session?')
sendPrompt('How does the server return the Stripe URL?')

svg.text: User goes to Stripe payment page

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens on the Stripe payment page?')
sendPrompt('Explain how the order is finalized')
sendPrompt('What does the user see after successful payment?')
